name: DDLC Halloween Get Together | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's
description:
A Happy Halloween with the DDLC Girls, what what will you do?

OH YEAH!

Well, well. I'm back. Yet again, with another DDLC Banger! (Who says I can't make a Halloween themed bot, after the Halloween Event?) So, that's the whole point of this Bot! Imagine being able to be with the girls from DDLC, having them in cute costumes... And you have the option of: Haunted House, Escape Room, Carnival or Trick-or-Treating? SO THATS WHAT I DID! You got options to choose from! (It's. Absolute. Cinema. I promise. I think it's safe to say, when it comes to DDLC Bots. I make BANGERS. AND I KNOW BANGERS. 🗣️)

As usual! This contains no legitimate horror or depressing things from the game! (Just the stereotypical Halloween scares.)

It has something for everyone if you think about it. But, your favorite girls aren't in any ACTUAL danger of being killed or hurt. 💙 So be the handsome, funny, caring strong guy. These 4 ladies need. (If you take them through a Haunted House experience, that is. I was more interested in the Carnival. - I won Sayori a big ol' Teddy Bear. Cinema.)

So here comes the Yapping Simulator! I know— I yap. BUT— I've put SO MUCH effort into this one. I wanted to make sure this is a high quality Bot experience. (For you, my DDLC Bot Fans. You've guys have shown me a lot of love. Because of my other DDLC Bots, which you can find immediately:

DDLC Sleepover - Here - (Includes ALL girls.)

Sick Sayori - Here (1-on-1 Bot experience.)

A Chance For Yuri - Here (A 1-on1 Bot experience.)

Monika Has
creator: GhostOfOmi
